name: vera
description: Palisade Payment Prototype — microservices monorepo (tap, activation, pay, vault, admin)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n tap,activation,pay,vault,admin,activation-ui,pay-ui,admin-ui -c magenta,cyan,blue,yellow,green,cyan.dim,blue.dim,green.dim "npm run dev -w services/tap" "npm run dev -w services/activation" "npm run dev -w services/pay" "npm run dev -w services/vault" "npm run dev -w services/admin" "npm run dev -w @vera/activation-frontend" "npm run dev -w @vera/pay-frontend" "npm run dev -w @vera/admin-frontend"
